{
  "task": "Classify neutral lab nodes using only the observations and evidence IDs. Do not invent evidence. Keep service behavior and artifact-like notes separate.",
  "allowed_node_labels": [
    "LOW_INTERACTION_HONEYPOT",
    "MIXED_INTERACTIVE_DECOY",
    "HFISH_DECEPTION_NODE",

  ],

  ],

    "service_vs_bait_distinction": {
      "explicitly_distinguished": true,
      "service_evidence_ids": [],
      "bait_evidence_ids": [],

    },

      "real_service_accused": false,

    },
    "claims": [],

  },
  "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
  "observations": [
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_A_SERVICE_MAP",
      "node_alias": "NODE_A",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_A_HTTP",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_001",
      "observation": "node-a presents web, database, and file-sharing-style response surfaces; responses are concise and show little deeper application state."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_A_HTTP_RESPONSE",
      "node_alias": "NODE_A",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_A_HTTP",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_002",
      "observation": "node-a web response is available through the internal service surface and returns a compact protocol-shaped response."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_A_DATABASE_RESPONSE",
      "node_alias": "NODE_A",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_A_MYSQL",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_003",
      "observation": "node-a database-like response surface is available, but no durable business data is observed from this action."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "READ_NODE_A_EVENT_SUMMARY",
      "node_alias": "NODE_A",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_A_HTTP",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_004",
      "observation": "node-a event summary records shallow protocol-surface readiness and probe output."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "COMPARE_NODE_A_SIGNAL_CONSISTENCY",
      "node_alias": "NODE_A",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_A_HTTP",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_005",
      "observation": "node-a service signals are internally consistent as brief protocol-shaped surfaces without application-level state."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_C_STATUS",
      "node_alias": "NODE_C",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_C_REMOTE",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_006",
      "observation": "node-c client is running, registered, and posting status from the node container."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_C_SERVICE_SUMMARY",
      "node_alias": "NODE_C",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_C_REMOTE",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_007",
      "observation": "node-c exposes remote/web-style service surfaces and posts successful telemetry from the node package."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_C_REMOTE_ACCESS_RESPONSE",
      "node_alias": "NODE_C",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_C_REMOTE",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_008",
      "observation": "node-c remote-access style surface is enabled by the registered node package."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "OBSERVE_NODE_C_WEB_RESPONSE",
      "node_alias": "NODE_C",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_C_WEB",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_009",
      "observation": "node-c web-style surface is part of the registered node service set."
    },
    {
      "schema_version": "realism-observation-v1",
      "status": "ok",
      "scenario_id": "SCENARIO_A_LITE_SERVICE_DECEPTION",
      "action_id": "READ_NODE_C_EVENT_SUMMARY",
      "node_alias": "NODE_C",
      "channel": "service",
      "asset_id": "SVC_C_REMOTE",
      "evidence_id": "LIVE_A_010",
      "observation": "node-c telemetry posts are accepted and linked to the node-c service summary."
    }
  ]
}
Return strict JSON only. Cite evidence_ids. Separate service evidence from artifact evidence. Mark uncertainty when observations are insufficient.
